applyTo: "**/equipment/**"
description: "Warrior balance reference. Use when: evaluating warrior ability costs/damage/cooldowns, comparing warrior equipment across rarities, checking berserk/shield/sanctified/earthen archetype balance."
---

# Warrior Balance Reference

## Resource Profile
| Max Stamina | Max Mana | Stam Regen/s | Mana Regen/s |
|-------------|----------|--------------|--------------|
| 50 | 25 | 2.0 | 1.0 |

**Identity:** Stamina-dominant. Almost all abilities are stamina-only. Mana is a secondary/rare resource.

---

## COMMON Abilities (10)

| Equipment | Mana | Stam | CD(s) | Effect (Base→Upgraded) | Type |
|-----------|------|------|-------|------------------------|------|
| Adrenaline | 0 | 0 | 5 | +100 stam, -5 DR (10s), 1→2 uses | Active |
| Battle Cry | 0 | 20 | 15 | 14→20 strength (10s) | Active |
| Basic Infusion Mastery | — | — | — | +2→3 concussed app, heal 5→10 on sanctified | Passive |
| Brace | 0 | 15 | 10 | 20→30 shields (5s) | Active |
| Cleave | 0 | 10 | 5 | 70→100 slashing (90° cone, range 5) | Active |
| Empowered Edge | 0 | 15 | 7→5 | 50→70 slashing (next basic) + 3→4 shields | Active |
| Endurance Training | — | — | — | +2→3 shield duration, start with 5 shields | Passive |
| Furor | — | — | — | Start with 5 str + 3→5 berserk | Passive |
| Sturdy | 0 | 0 | 5 | 8→12 shields (on shield raise) | Active |
| Tackle | 0 | 15 | 20 | 100→130 blunt (2.5 rad AoE, dash) | Active |

### Common Baselines
- Cost: 0 mana, 10–20 stamina
- Cooldown: 5–20s
- Direct damage: 50–130
- Shields: 8–30 per cast
- Stamina efficiency: 5–10 dmg/stam

---

| Wind Slash | 0 | 25 | 10 | 140→180 slashing (3→5 projectiles cone, range 8) | Active |
| Windcutter | — | — | — | Every 3rd basic (>50% stam): 5 piercing projs, 80→120 slash (-8 stam) | Passive |

### Uncommon Baselines
- Cost: 0 mana (usually), 0–50 stamina
- Cooldown: 5–25s
- Direct damage: 100–250
- Shields: 10–50 per cast
- Stamina efficiency: 4–9 dmg/stam

### Archetype Groups (Uncommon)
- **Berserk**: Berserker's Call, Bide, Bloodlust, Endurance, Ferocity, Frenzy, Fury, Revenge, Roar
- **Shield/Defense**: Brace II, Bulwark, Charge, Embolden, Ironskin, Skirmisher
- **Earthen/Concussed**: Break the Line, Earthen Tackle, Fissure, Granite Shield, Hold the Line, Quake, Exploit Weakness
- **Sanctified/Light**: Atone, Blessed Edge, Brightshell, Enlighten, Pool of Light, Prayer, Smite, Weapon Enchant: Holy
- **Stamina Economy**: Burst, Discipline, Mortal Engine, Titan

### Rare Baselines
- Cost: 0–30 mana, 25–100 stamina
- Cooldown: 5–40s
- Direct damage: 200–600
- Stamina efficiency: 6–12 dmg/stam
- Many passives are "combined" versions of uncommon pairs

---

## Key Balance Patterns

### Cost Economy
- Warriors spend 10–50 stamina per ability (2.0 stam/s regen = 5–25s to recover)
- Mana is used by ~5 uncommon abilities and ~3 rare (mainly sanctified/light archetype)
- Passive abilities are common at all rarities

### Damage Scaling by Rarity
| Rarity | Single-target | AoE | Shields |
|--------|--------------|-----|---------|
| Common | 50–130 | 70–100 | 8–30 |
| Uncommon | 100–220 | 100–180 | 10–50 |
| Rare | 200–600 | 250–400 | 40–60 |
| Epic | 300–400 (passive) | 300+ | 60–100 |

### Upgrade Patterns
- Damage: +40–50% typical
- Shields: +50%
- Cooldown: -25–30%
- Status stacks: +50%
- Threshold conditions: lowered by ~25–35%
